mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of observations when FEDFUNDS remains below 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day forward returns occur in >60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and business demand growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative 60-day forward returns in >50% of cases when both series exceed their 12-month moving averages.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production levels reflect expanding manufacturing output and supply chain normalization, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >55% of observations when INDPRO increases month-over-month.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the consumer price index exceeding 0.4 percent triggers expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain positive in >65% of triggered instances despite the inflation threshold breach.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirm robust labor market tightening, supporting corporate earnings expectations and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal fails to predict positive 20-day returns in >50% of observations over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly gross domestic product growth above the long-term trend signals expanding economic activity and corporate revenue growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in >55% of quarters where GDPC1 exceeds its 4-quarter moving average.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below the 98.0 index level indicates severe manufacturing contraction and supply chain bottlenecks, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day forward returns occur in >60% of observations when INDPRO drops below the 98.0 threshold.
